name: account-intel
description: Entity-centric footprint & reputation intelligence — profile a specific person, brand, or handle across X/Twitter + YouTube + the web (news + citations) into one cross-platform footprint brief. Spans three rails (direct Circle nanopayment + MPP + x402 on Base), paid per call over selat-pay (USDC via Circle Gateway), no API keys.

handle.description: X/Twitter handle (no @) to pull a profile and recent tweets for (used as ${handle}).

name.description: Display name of the person/brand/entity to search YouTube + web news + citations for (used as ${name}).

query.description: Free-text query reserved for additional entity searches (used as ${query}).

address.description: EVM contract/token address to pull on-chain asset footprint for any token associated with the entity (used as ${address}).

steps.label: X/Twitter profile — AIsa Twitter API (Circle x402 catalog; DIRECT, Circle Gateway-batched)
X/Twitter recent tweets — AIsa Twitter API (Circle x402 catalog; DIRECT, Circle Gateway-batched)
YouTube presence — AIsa YouTube API (Circle x402 catalog; DIRECT, Circle Gateway-batched)
Web reputation / news — Brave news-search (ROUTED MPP via Locus, SELAT Router)
Web context / citations — Exa search (routed x402 on Base via SELAT Router)
On-chain token footprint — Alchemy token-by-address (DIRECT x402, Circle Gateway-batched on Base)
